modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: File Explorer not responding on Windows laptop

full_description_text: 
User clicked on file explorer but it just says not responding. They can't access any files or folders. Even after rebooting, file explorer still won't open.
short_description: File Explorer not responding on Windows laptop
description: User clicked on file explorer but it just says not responding. They can't access any files or folders. Even after rebooting, file explorer still won't open.
